## Checklist

<!-- Ensure all items are completed before requesting review -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project (`task format`)
- [ ] Linting checks pass (`task lint`)
- [ ] Type checking passes (`task type-check`)
- [ ] All CI checks pass

### Testing

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally
- [ ] I have tested the changes manually

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the documentation (if necessary)
- [ ] I have added/updated docstrings for new/modified functions
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md (if applicable)

### Security & Best Practices

- [ ] I have considered security implications
- [ ] I have added appropriate error handling
- [ ] I have not introduced any new warnings
- [ ] I have not added dependencies without justification
